chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D- 1814 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on CMA 7176/2025 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 3. For orders on CMA No.7177/2025 (Ex.A) 4. For hearing of main case 29-10-2025 Mr. Rehmat Ali Shaikh, Advocate for the Petitioner. >>>>>..<<<<< At the very outset, learned counsel for the petitioner was confronted as to the maintainability of the instant petition in view of the judgment passed in the case of General Post Office, Islamabad & others v. Muhammad Jalal reported as PLD 2024 SC 1276. Learned counsel submits that a Review Petition has been preferred in the aforesaid matter; however, for the time being, he does not press the instant petition. He further submits that after the decision of the Hon’ble Supreme Court in the Review Petition, if the petitioner feels that he has a right to be appointed under the deceased quota, he will approach this Court by filing a fresh petition. Order accordingly. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
